other_observers: Paul Neldner, Megan Neldner; Polly Wren Neldner
description: Very large sparrow. Brown spotted head with white chin triangle. Pink Bill, white belly. Small inverted well defined spotted "V" on breast. White wing bars.Behaviors: Very active. Behavior similar to Spotted Towhee. Actively scratching the ground and dashing back under cover.Call: none heardPlumage: First year
photographer: Photographer: Polly Wren Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner
